comment.body:
Ya I think there’s some of that, but it’s still useful and practical. I think he personally has an affinity towards the Chinese so it definitely shows through. But their productions capacity is continually increasing and they don’t give two flying fucks about automating their population out of work. They don’t have to deal with unions or civil rights. Just look at the port strikes that happened last year… and compare a Chinese port to an American port.

The truth seems to be somewhere in between Ray Dalio and Peter Zeihan imho

comment.body:
Alma this is my attempt ( 2) What are the daily key levels and what dynamics confirm up or down?
Downside Pivot: 4570 — break below = bearish confirmation
Upside Pivot: 4900 — break above = bullish move starts
Resistance Zones:
4924 (needs low volatility to break)
4992 (volatility likely increases here = hard to break)
5120+ (true bullish momentum only above this)
 Bullish confirmation: Hold above 4900–4924 with low vol
 Bearish confirmation: Break below 4570 with rising vol
